meaning: n.凯普莱特(莎士比亚剧本<<罗密欧与朱丽叶>>中朱丽叶家族的姓)
examples: Capulet, heads of two houses at variance with each other.
His cousin Benvolio and Tybalt, the hotheaded nephew of Lady Capulet.
Romeo, I've been wounded by a Capulet because of the feud they have with your family!
The production will also star two-time Tony Award nominee Jayne Houdyshell as the Nurse and Tony nominee Joe Morton as Lord Capulet.
In Romeo and Juliet, a member of the Capulet family makes a rude hand gesture in the direction of a group of Montagues.
